tree.name: Pelle Larsson
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: MIA sent Nikola Djurisic to ATL; ATL sent A.J. Griffin to HOU and cash to MIA; HOU sent Pelle Larsson to MIA. Atlanta also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: Nikola Djurisic
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted 43rd overall by MIA in 2024, sent to ATL
